description: Important intermediate objects traversed along the real chain and which fields cross each boundary.

objects.name: cv_text (raw)
objects.produced_by: compass.pipeline.text_extraction_stage.extract_profile_text (from PDF/TXT bytes) OR direct string input (/profile/parse-baseline)
objects.notes: Single input to the whole CV chain.

objects.name: baseline_result (dict)
key_fields: skills_raw (list[str]) — raw tokens detected from cv_text
profile (dict) — the payload handed to the HTTP response and later to matching
objects.notes: Built by baseline_parser.py:152-157. skills_uri here is the canonical output of map_skill + collapse_to_uris applied to cv_text tokens.

objects.name: CVPipelineResult (dataclass)
objects.notes: compass.canonical_pipeline.py docstring states: 'score_core is NEVER read or written by this module. DOMAIN_SKILLS_ACTIVE are display/context only — NOT injected into matching weights.' So Compass E outputs do NOT reach scoring directly from here.

objects.name: profile (dict) — HTTP response payload
objects.notes: Shape is a PLAIN DICT, shipped in the HTTP response of /profile/parse-* endpoints. The caller is expected to round-trip it unchanged to /inbox or /v1/match.

objects.name: ExtractedProfile (dataclass, frozen)
skills_uri_construction_rules: at extractors.py:311-321 — if raw_profile['skills_uri'] is a non-empty list, that list is used VERBATIM (dedup only). Alias-expansion + map_skill path is SKIPPED.
at extractors.py:322-343 — else, alias-expand normalized labels via SKILL_ALIASES then map_skill(label, enable_fuzzy=False) per label, then collapse_to_uris.
at extractors.py:345-353 — if raw_profile['domain_uris'] non-empty, appended to skills_uri_list (dedup).

at extractors.py:358-359 — build_effective_skills_uri(skills_uri_list, raw_profile): when ELEVIA_PROMOTE_ESCO=0 (default), returns frozenset(skills_uri_list) — BIT-FOR-BIT identical to pre-Sprint-6 path.

objects.name: offer (dict) — scoring unit
key_fields_used_in_scoring: skills_uri (list[str]) — read at matching_v1.py:368, fallback to _map_offer_skills_to_uris(offer['skills']) if missing
skills (list[str]) — label fallback for URI mapping
offer_cluster, title, description — for contextual weighting
languages, education, country, is_vie, company (hard filter)

tracked_fields.skills: Input label channel on raw_profile. ExtractedProfile.skills is the frozenset of normalized+alias-expanded labels. NOT directly consumed by _score_skills when URI scoring is active (default).
tracked_fields.skills_uri: Primary scoring channel. On raw_profile: list[str]. On ExtractedProfile: frozenset[str]. Read directly by _score_skills.
tracked_fields.skills_uri_promoted: Declared in compass/profile/profile_effective_skills.py — populated by promotion path (not traversed in default runs). Merged into effective only when ELEVIA_PROMOTE_ESCO=1.
tracked_fields.effective_skills_uri: NOT stored as a field on the profile dict; computed in-memory by build_effective_skills_uri at extract_profile time and assigned to ExtractedProfile.skills_uri.
tracked_fields.domain_uris: Optional field on raw_profile populated by Compass E layer. Appended to base URI list inside extract_profile (lines 345-353) before build_effective_skills_uri.
tracked_fields.canonical_skills: Response-only field on /profile/parse-* payloads (from canonical_mapping_stage). NOT read back by extract_profile at matching time.
tracked_fields.profile.skills: List of str labels expected on inbox/match requests. Used for alias expansion inside extract_profile when skills_uri is absent; used for cluster detection.
tracked_fields.matching_skills: Alternate field read first at extractors.py:262-263; falls back to 'skills' if None.
